_meta.description: Pi 5 runtime tuning values. Hot-reloaded automatically — no restart needed. Selected via CONFIG_PATH in .env. Secrets and paths belong in .env, not here.
changelog: 2026-03-15 23:34:22 EDT  Initial config: calibration, intervals, sensor thresholds, display scaling factors.

2026-03-16 03:45:00 EDT  Calibrate gas thresholds to observed indoor baseline (247 rows). rd baseline 97-113 kΩ, nh3 baseline 152-187 kΩ. Old thresholds (rd green_min=150, nh3 green_min=500) were unrealistic.
2026-03-16 04:00:00 EDT  Update cal_actual_f 74.4→75.1 per overnight hygrometer reference (74.9-75.3°F).
2026-03-16 00:00:00 EDT  Add hardware section for Pi 5 port — SPI, GPIO pins, I2C addr. Values here match Pi 3 B+ / Pi 5 wiring (Enviro+ HAT pinout is identical).

2026-03-16 00:00:00 EDT  Add cpu_factor_override=1.8488. Pi 5 runs hotter so BME280 is at 34.7°C steady-state vs 22.7°C at cold startup, making the computed CPU_FACTOR wrong. Override bypasses startup calibration with a steady-state-measured value. Null = revert to computed.
2026-03-18 00:00:00 EDT  Split from dynamic_config.json into Pi 5-specific file. Pi 3 B+ uses dynamic_config.json; Pi 5 selects this file via CONFIG_PATH in .env.

hardware._comment: Enviro+ HAT pinout is the same on Pi 3 B+ and Pi 5 — only serial device may differ (set PMS5003_DEVICE in .env)
